hero.subtitle: One week of kosher cooking, baking, trips, water play, and Jewish values.

camp_details.location: Chabad of Southern Delaware, Lewes, DE

activities.title: Kosher cooking
activities.description: Campers help prepare simple kosher recipes with guidance from staff.

activities.title: Trips and water play
activities.description: Fun trips and water play are part of the week.

activities.title: Jewish values
activities.description: Jewish values are woven into the activities in a warm Chabad setting.

photos.headline: Camp photos
photos.body: Photos can be added here once real camp pictures are available.
photos.callout_body: Use the CMS to add or replace real camp photos.

faq.question: What are the camp dates and hours?
faq.answer: Camp runs Monday-Friday, August 17-21, 2026, from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.

faq.question: What will the kids do?
faq.answer: The week includes kosher cooking, baking, fun trips, water play, and Jewish values woven throughout.

faq.question: How do I register?
faq.answer: The online form is coming soon. For now, contact Rabbi Sholom at (302) 377-1162 or Rabbi@JewishSouthernDelaware.com.

faq.question: What is the cost?
faq.answer: Early bird registration is $250 per child. Regular price is $300. Register early to save!
